introSection: Canadian Jet Rider (Japanese: カナディアンジェットライダー) was a steel terrain roller coaster previously located at Tama Tech Motopia in Hino, Tokyo, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a bundle of logs.

fullText:
Canadian Jet Rider (Japanese: カナディアンジェットライダー) was a steel terrain roller coaster previously located at Tama Tech Motopia in Hino, Tokyo, Japan.



Light brown track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble a bundle of logs.
